message:
Correctness and performance fixes from file-by-file review

Correctness:
- Fix buildDocSrcPositions ignoring JSON5 parser (read wrong tape data)
- Fix context_stack overflow in preprocess_json5_alloc (return null at depth 256)
- Fix tapeDeepEqualIterative missing bounds check on tape B iterator
- Fix hex literal overflow in JSON5 preprocessor (saturating arithmetic)
- Fix stream.zig depth underflow checked after completion (swap order)
- Fix growBuffer infinite loop when buffer_cap=0 and null buffer case
- Fix createParser key escape decoding (raw byte instead of decoded char)
- Fix isComplete reading one-past-end tape index (off-by-one)
- Fix init() race condition on concurrent async calls (cache promise)
- Add SIMD fast path for JSON5 single-quoted strings in stream scanner

Performance:
- buf.slice() → buf.subarray() in fireValueComplete (avoid copy)
- Cache + bind Array.prototype methods on lazy proxy arrays
- readBatchPaginated uses typed array chunks instead of push loop

7 new tests covering key escapes, array methods, isComplete, schema pick
